titles.title: I Like The Old Time Way

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I like the old time singing, shouting, I like the old time way. I like the old time singing, shouting, Preaching, praying, I like the old time way.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I sing about my Saviour everywhere I go, Everywhere I go, everywhere I go; I sing about my Saviour everywhere I go For there's joy, joy in my soul.
